subjects.description: An oncoming vehicle in the opposite lane, identifiable mainly by its intensely bright high-beam headlights piercing through the darkness; the body of the car is obscured behind the glare, only faint hints of a dark sedan silhouette visible around the light source
subjects.appearance_details: Two blinding white-blue circular headlight pools with prominent lens-flare star artifacts, halation, and bloom radiating outward; faint amber side marker glow
subjects.relationship: The source of glare impairing the ego vehicle's visibility; travels directly opposite the ego on the shared coastal road
subjects.location: center to slightly left of frame, approaching from background to midground
subjects.relative_size: Small within frame growing to Medium within frame as it nears
subjects.orientation: Front-facing toward the camera, headlights aimed directly at the ego viewpoint
subjects.action: Approaching on the opposite lane with high beams on, then passing by
subjects.state_changes: Grows brighter and larger as it crests the coastal rise, peaks in glare at closest approach, then sweeps past to the left and recedes above the surf, glare clearing

subjects.description: The ego vehicle itself, represented only by its interior dashboard edge and the forward illumination of its own headlights spilling onto the road ahead
subjects.appearance_details: Faint dashboard reflection along the bottom edge of the frame, twin cones of headlight light spreading over the asphalt and lane markings
subjects.relationship: The point-of-view vehicle through which the entire scene is observed
subjects.location: implied at camera position, dashboard at bottom foreground
subjects.orientation: Facing forward down the road in the driving direction
subjects.action: Driving the coastal road, rolling over a coastal rise, then continuing while slowing and resuming speed
subjects.state_changes: Decelerates significantly during peak glare, then accelerates back to nominal cruising speed

background_setting: A rolling coastal two-lane road at dusk in the blue hour under a clear, gusty summer sky, a warm band still glowing low over the ocean to one side. No central divider; the asphalt carries a faint salt sheen and worn lane markings, edged by low windswept grass and a guardrail above the surf. The road rolls up and over a coastal rise ahead, the crest briefly hiding then revealing the oncoming lane against the darkening sea. Beyond the rise the water and sky merge into deep blue-black.

lighting.conditions: Blue-hour dusk over the coast with a fading horizon band; no street lighting, headlights only
lighting.direction: Ego headlights front-lit; intense oncoming high-beam glare cresting the rise straight ahead and slightly left
lighting.shadows: Faint long blue shadows from grass and guardrail posts stretching across salt-sheened asphalt
lighting.illumination_effect: Residual horizon glow on the sea with cool blue ambient on the road; oncoming high beams produce overwhelming bloom, salt-hazed starburst flares, and washout against the dusk

aesthetics.composition: Coastal road rolling over a rise near mid-frame with sea to one side, oncoming glare cresting upper-center, dashboard edge at bottom
aesthetics.color_scheme: Deep blue-hour sea and sky with a warm horizon band over salt-grey asphalt, cut by harsh white-blue headlight glare
aesthetics.mood_atmosphere: Tense, exposed, disorienting, momentarily blinding, cautious in the wind
aesthetics.patterns: Guardrail posts and dashed lane markings sliding past above the surf

cinematography.camera_motion: Forward dashcam tracking along the coast, wind-buffeted micro-sway, subtle bob over the rise, deceleration drift then re-acceleration
cinematography.framing: Wide shot of the road ahead from driver viewpoint
cinematography.focus: Road and lane markings ahead, though glare overwhelms focus at peak brightness

context: Demonstration of nighttime oncoming-headlight glare and driver visibility management on a coastal road

actions.description: Ego vehicle drives the coastal road at nominal speed, distant oncoming headlights appear faint past a coastal rise
Vehicle rolls over the rise; oncoming high beams rapidly intensify, flooding the dusk view with glare and lens artifacts
Ego vehicle slows significantly to manage impaired visibility as the oncoming car passes on the left
Glare clears, coastal road becomes visible again, ego vehicle resumes nominal speed

segments.description: Driving the coastal road at steady speed with faint oncoming light growing past a coastal rise
segments.key_changes: Distant headlights begin to appear against the dusk sea
segments.camera: Forward tracking with slight upward pitch on the climb

segments.description: Rolling over the coastal rise as oncoming high beams flare into severe glare
segments.key_changes: Rapid increase in brightness, bloom and starburst artifacts wash across the frame
segments.camera: Subtle bob over the crest, then leveling into descent

segments.description: Ego vehicle slows for the passing car, then glare clears and nominal speed resumes
segments.key_changes: Deceleration, oncoming vehicle sweeps past left, artifacts fade, coastal road regains visibility, re-acceleration
segments.camera: Slight forward dip during braking, then smooth resumed forward tracking

temporal_caption: At 0:00 the dashcam view shows a rolling coastal road at blue-hour dusk, ego headlights over salt-sheened markings with a warm horizon band beyond, while a faint glow appears past a coastal rise. By 0:01 the vehicle rolls over the rise and a pair of oncoming high beams rapidly brightens. Through 0:02-0:03 the view is overwhelmed by white-blue glare, lens-flare starbursts, and bloom against the darkening sea. Around 0:03 the ego slows noticeably to cope with impaired visibility as the oncoming car sweeps past on the left. From 0:04 to 0:05 the glare clears, the coastal road reappears, and the ego accelerates back to nominal cruising speed.
audio_description: Steady low hum of the engine and tire noise on dry asphalt, rising then dipping as the vehicle decelerates. Gusty wind buffeting and distant surf, a faint whoosh of the oncoming vehicle passing; no music or speech.
